name: sovereign-seo-analyzer-mcp
description: MCP server for SEO analysis — check meta tags, heading hierarchy, link analysis, keyword density, robots.txt and sitemap generation.

tools.name: check_headings
tools.description: Analyze heading hierarchy (H1-H6) for SEO best practices.

tools.name: keyword_density
tools.description: Analyze keyword/word frequency and density on a page.

tools.name: generate_robots_txt
tools.description: Generate a robots.txt file for a given domain.

tools.name: generate_sitemap
tools.description: Generate a basic sitemap.xml from a list of URLs.
